slide1.title: OSAGO or KASKO policy — in 2 minutes
slide1.body: Enter your car number — the data fills in automatically. Pay with Uzcard or Humo.

slide2.title: Road assistance anytime
slide2.body: Call an accident inspector or file an electronic euro-protocol right from your phone.

slide3.title: A partner network near you
slide3.body: Auto services and medical clinics across Uzbekistan. Book and pay in the app.

authChoose.title: Welcome
authChoose.subtitle: Sign in or create an account
authChoose.terms: By continuing, you agree to the offer terms and privacy policy

phone.title: Enter your phone number
phone.subtitle: We'll send an SMS with a verification code
phone.label: Phone number

errors.network: Failed to send the code. Check your internet.

home.loadErrorServer: Server returned an error ({{status}}). Try again later.
home.loadErrorNetwork: Check your internet connection and try again.

start.title: Had an accident?
start.subtitle: We'll help — file everything right in the app
start.step2: Record the scene without leaving it
start.euroDesc: If both drivers agree and there are no injuries
start.inspectorDesc: Our specialist will come to the scene and help

step1.title: When and where
step1.subtitle: Time is recorded automatically, location is detected by GPS
step1.geoOffMsg: To record the accident location, allow location access in Settings.
step1.geoError: Could not detect location. Please try again.

step2.title: Accident participants
step2.subtitle: Both participants are verified via MyID
step2.verifySelfHint: First confirm your identity via MyID — then your vehicles and policies will appear.
step2.noVehicles: No cars in the garage. Add a vehicle to file a europrotocol.
step2.noOsago: No active OSAGO found for the selected vehicle. Get OSAGO or pick another vehicle — a europrotocol cannot be filed without a policy.
step2.noLicenseHint: No license in the profile — fill it in; it will be included in the notice and saved to the profile.
step2.participantFoundPickVehicle: Participant found in the system — select their vehicle.
step2.noVehicleEnterTp: The participant has no vehicle in the system — enter the tech passport details.
step2.notInSystemLookup: The participant is not in the system — we'll find the vehicle by tech passport in the state registry.
step2.vehSearching: Searching for the vehicle in the state registry…
step2.vehNotFound: Vehicle not found in the registry. Check the tech passport series/number and plate number.
step2.otherOsagoFromProfile: Second participant's OSAGO policy (from their profile)
step2.noOsagoEnterManual: No active OSAGO for this vehicle in the system — enter the policy details.
step2.polChecking: Checking the policy in the registry…
step2.polNotFound: Policy not found in the registry. Check the series and number.
step2.polError: Could not check the policy. Please try again.
step2.mismatchMsg: Identity did not match the account owner. Party A must be verified by the phone owner.

step3.title: Collision diagram
step3.subtitle: Mark on the map how the cars stood and describe how the accident happened
step3.accuracyWarning: Specify the accident location and the cars' positions accurately. With incorrect data, the insurer may deny the payout.
step3.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe how the accident happened: direction of travel, who hit whom, weather conditions…
step3.descriptionHint: The text goes into the accident notice. The more precise it is, the faster the payout is reviewed.
step3.circumstancesHint: Mark the applicable items for «A» (you) and «B» (the second participant).
step3.impactZoneHint: Tap the spot where the first impact occurred.
step3.damageHint: Mark the damaged parts on the diagram. The list will be included in the notice.
step3.damageDetailAPlaceholder: e.g. dent on the door, broken headlight…
step3.ownershipDocPlaceholder: Series/number of the power of attorney or contract
step3.canMove: Can the vehicle move on its own?
step3.remarksPlaceholder: Dictate by voice or type text…
step3.openMapHint: Place two cars on the map of the current location and mark the impact point

step4.title: Photograph the scene
step4.subtitle: At least 3 shots. Shoot without moving the cars
step4.cameraOnlyBanner: Camera capture only. Uploading from the gallery is disabled.
step4.galleryPermission: Allow access to the media library.
step4.cameraPermissionPhoto: Allow camera access to take a photo.
step4.captureUnavailable: Capture is unavailable. On the simulator use «Simulate».

step5.title: Check the details
step5.subtitle: Before submitting, make sure everything is correct
step5.submitError: Could not submit the europrotocol. Please try again.
step5.signatureConfirmed: ✓ Confirmed via MyID — this counts as the second participant's signature and consent.
step5.confirmCheckbox: I confirm that all details are correct and both participants agree with the circumstances of the accident
step5.footerNote: Both identities are verified via MyID. After submission, the notice goes into review — track its status in the «Claims» section.

success.title: Notice submitted
success.subtitle: Europrotocol filed. Track the payout status in the «Claims» section.
success.medReminder: Within 4 hours, both drivers must undergo a medical examination at a narcology clinic.

check.title: Is europrotocol suitable?
check.subtitle: Confirm all conditions. If at least one is not met — an inspector or ГАИ is required
check.warning: Not all conditions are confirmed yet. If any is not met, filing via europrotocol is not possible — call an inspector.

conditions.twoVehicles: Only 2 vehicles are involved in the accident
conditions.agree: Both drivers agree on the circumstances
conditions.bothOsago: Both drivers have a valid ОСАГО policy

detail.pdfError: Couldn't get the PDF. Please try again later.

list.title: Europrotocols
list.emptySubtitle: File an accident notice — both parties are confirmed via MyID

scheme.title: Accident scheme
scheme.subtitle: Transparent car — where you came from, solid — the point of impact. The arrow shows the direction.
scheme.warning: ⚠️ Mark the accident location and the cars' positions accurately. With incorrect data the insurer may deny the payout.
scheme.dragHint: Drag both points. Rotate car «{{car}}» to its position after the impact:
scheme.captureFailMsg: Couldn't capture the scheme. Please try again.
scheme.geoDeniedMsg: Allow location access to mark the accident place on the map.
scheme.geoErrorMsg: Couldn't determine the location. Please try again.

voice.micDeniedMsg: Allow microphone access in settings to record a remark by voice.
voice.saveFailMsg: Couldn't save the recording. Please try again.
voice.reRecordMsg: The recorded message will be deleted. Re-records left: {{left}}.
voice.recognizeFailMsg: Please try again or enter the remark manually.

hub.subtitle: Help nearby when you need it
hub.aiDiagnosisSub: Describe or say your symptoms — we'll tell you what to do
hub.sosHint: Press and hold the button for 1 second
hub.sosSub: Hold — we'll alert your contacts and send your location

triage.sendError: Couldn't send. Check your connection or start a new chat.
triage.restartMsg: The current conversation will be deleted.

diagnosis.title: Analysis result
diagnosis.error: Couldn't get the result. Go back and try again.

doctors.empty: No one found. Change your query or filter.
doctors.title: Doctors

booking.title: Book an appointment
booking.noSlots: The doctor is not available on this day

bookingDone.title: You're booked
bookingDone.subtitle: In-person visit · confirmed
bookingDone.note: We'll remind you a day and an hour before. You can cancel or reschedule in “My appointments”.

medcard.lockInfo: Available from the lock screen for emergency doctors. During SOS it is sent together with your location.

empty.title: Medical card not filled in yet
empty.subtitle: Blood type, allergies and chronic conditions will help emergency doctors in a critical situation.

contacts.emptyHint: No contacts added. Add your loved ones — they'll be alerted during SOS.
contacts.noNumberMsg: The selected contact has no phone number — enter it manually.
contacts.title:
Emergency
contacts
contacts.subtitle: Who to alert during SOS — we'll send a message and your location
contacts.name: Name
contacts.limitReached: You've reached the limit of {{limit}} contacts. Delete one to add another.
contacts.footer: Contacts receive a message only when SOS is activated. Your location is stored securely and not shared with third parties.

edit.iphoneOnly: The Health app is available only on iPhone.

bloodNote.notSet: Blood type isn't filled in the Health app. Add it in Health → Medical Data (or Summary → Medical Data → Blood Type) and try again — or enter it manually below.
bloodNote.denied: No access to blood type. Allow it in Settings → Privacy → Health → SOS24 → Blood Type, then try again.

edit.importedNote: Values are taken from the most recent measurement — check and correct them if needed before saving.
edit.noImportData: The Health app has no data available to import.
edit.readError: Couldn't read data from the Health app.
edit.title: Medical card
edit.importCta: Fill in from the Health app
edit.importSub: Blood type, height and weight — from Apple Health
edit.prefilledNote: Full name, date of birth and gender are filled from your profile — check and change if needed.
edit.consent: I consent to the processing and storage of medical data. The data is encrypted and available only to me and to emergency doctors during SOS.

clinics.title: Clinics
clinics.empty: No clinics found. Change the region or your query.

sos.errorSub: Check your connection and try again, or call 103.
sos.sendingSub: Notifying your loved ones and sending your location to the dispatcher
sos.noContacts: No emergency contacts added — the dispatcher has been notified anyway.

whoop.disconnectMsg: Metrics will stop updating. The data in your medical card will remain.
whoop.notConnected: WHOOP isn't connected. Go back to the Health screen and tap Connect.
whoop.disclaimer: Wearable data is for information only and is not a medical diagnosis.
whoop.overviewRecoveryNote: How well your body has recovered and is ready for strain — based on HRV, resting HR and last night's sleep.
whoop.recoveryNote: Recovery is calculated from heart rate variability (HRV), resting HR, sleep quality and last night's respiration.
whoop.sleepStagesNote: Deep sleep restores the body, REM restores the brain and memory. The more deep and REM sleep, the better the recovery.
whoop.strainNote: Total strain on the heart for the day (0–21). Compare it with recovery: high readiness → you can push harder.

recDesc.high: Well recovered — ready for a workout

whoop.connectSub: Recovery, sleep and heart rate — always up to date in the app

profileExtra.fillDataMsg: First enter the series, number, issue date and PINFL.
profileExtra.pdfUnavailableMsg: PDF upload will appear after an app update. For now, use a photo.
profileExtra.myIdPassportNote: Passport data was obtained from the government system and is protected from changes.
profileExtra.myIdNameNote: Full name and date of birth were obtained from the government system and cannot be changed manually.

myidOb.errorMsg: MyID verification failed. Check the lighting and try again.
myidOb.simErrorMsg: Simulation failed. Make sure MYID_MOCK=true on the backend.
myidOb.heading: Identity verification
myidOb.intro: To issue insurance policies, we need to verify your identity through the state MyID system.
myidOb.infoPill: Data is transmitted over a secure channel. State GNKR system.
